SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Check for updates on launch
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Automatically check for a new version each time the app starts

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Enrol in Beta
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Receive early access builds before they reach stable. May contain bugs.
